labelEmail: May we save your email ([email]@[domain.com]) to send you information about your DC SUN Bucks account?
helperEmail: This will help us communicate important information about your benefits.
labelDob: May we store your date of birth?
helperDob: This will help us find information about your benefits more easily.
optionHelperPhone: If this is your preference, messaging and data rates will apply.
labelText: May we text this phone number?
title: Would you like to get Summer EBT communication through email or SMS text?
body: If you choose email or text we’ll continue to also mail notices to your physical address.
textDescription: Select this option if you want to be messaged at ([999]) [999]-[9999]. This phone number needs to be able to receive text messages and can’t be changed.
